title: tanacetum corymbosum
intro: Tanacetum corymbosum, also known as the narrow-leaved tansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Tanacetum corymbosum include its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and relaxation. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum corymbosum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
